workflows.label: AppImage
workflows.description: Build and validate the concrete AppImage artifact for this project.

workflows.label: Flatpak bundle
workflows.description: Build, validate, install or uninstall the concrete Flatpak artifact for this project.

workflows.label: Native system installation
workflows.description: Install, uninstall or purge the concrete native system installation.

workflows.label: Native user installation
workflows.description: Install, uninstall or purge the concrete native user installation.

workflows.label: Linux unpacked tarball
workflows.description: Release tarball generated from the Linux unpacked directory.

workflows.label: SHA256SUMS
workflows.description: Release checksum manifest for generated artifacts.

workflows.label: Debian package
workflows.description: Debian package support is planned and must not report false success.

workflows.label: RPM package
workflows.description: RPM package support is planned and must not report false success.

workflows.label: AUR package
workflows.description: AUR package support is planned and must not report false success.
